allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/SolDoesDev/Charlies-Portfolio-Site/actions/runs?per_page=5" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "test" }; $r.workflow_runs | Select-Object name, status, conclusion, head_branch, created_at, html_url | Format-List } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/SolDoesDev/Charlies-Portfolio-Site/pages" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "test" }; $r | Format-List } catch { Write-Output "ERROR:"; Write-Output $_.Exception.Message; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })
